steps: ligate CTSL sequence with pET28a vector.
Inoculate 1ml overnight culture into 100ml 2xYT media in a 500 ml flask.
Incubate in a 37°C shaker until OD600 reaches 0.6 (About 3.5 hours), and then add 100 mM IPTG 100ul and incubate for 3 hr.
Pellet the bacteria at 6, 000 rpm for 5-6min, resuspend in 9ml PBS containing protease inhibitors and transfer to 50 ml conical tubes.
Sonicate the bacterial suspension on ice, 4 times x 1min with 30s rests (powder setting: cup, 10; tip, 5)
Transfer the resulting sonicate to a 10-15 ml conical tube and incubate with 1ml 10% Triton X-100 for 30min at 4°C on a rocker

Transfer the lysates to high-speed tubes (usually 12-14ml falcon tubes from BD or VWR), and centrifuge at 11, 000rpm at 4°C to remove unlysed bacteria and cell debris from sonicate. Keep the supernatant, and repeat the step 7 once
Keep the supernatant in 15ml conical tubes
Add His beads (200-250ul) and incubate for 1h at RT with constant rocking.
Pellet the beads at 2, 000 rpm for 2 min, 4°C, and aspirate the supernatant.
Wash the beads 3 times with PBS, 5 min each at RT with rocking
creator: Wenxue Wu
